extracted_from: field_classification.md Category B + Mirko NOTA on lca/lcc.capital_goods.amortized derivation
purpose: Fields derived during engine pipeline execution from Phase 1 nodes, per-flow Q5 outputs, calculation sequence, or analytical-level architecture. NOT set directly by individual Phase 1 nodes; emerge as composite/computed state.

fields.derivation: For each flow: q5=a -> 'zero_burden_applied'; q5=b -> 'evt_with_sensitivity'; q5=c -> 'substitution_q_corrected'; q5=d -> 'no_zero_burden_integrated_remodel'; q5=e -> 'system_expansion_uniform'.

fields.computed_from: lcc_hc_12 + lcc_hc_13 evaluated against flow.q5 (only when q5 != 'e')
fields.derivation: Per-flow output of the LCC avoidable/unavoidable test. Must align per-flow with lca.zero_burden_classification per IR-15.
Constant per LCA method: entity-first then network consolidation.

fields.computed_from: engine config (procedural per LCC HC-09, LCC HC-19)
fields.derivation: Strict 4-step sequence: entity -> flow -> network -> baseline.
Three-level analytical exposition for LCA output: network, entity, flow.

fields.computed_from: engine architecture (per LCC HC-01, LCC HC-19)
fields.derivation: Three-level analytical exposition for LCC output: network, entity, flow.
Three-level analytical exposition for S-LCA output: system, stakeholder, indicator.

fields.computed_from: alias / cross-method consistency check vs lca.reference_scenario.type (set by lca_mc_26)
fields.derivation: When LCA active: required to equal lca.reference_scenario.type by IR-07 (FU+boundary+temporal+geographic). When LCC standalone: derived from Q1 (Q1=A -> alt-disposal, Q1=B -> hypothetical-no-IS, Q1=C -> BAU national mix). Not stored on a Phase 1 node; computed aliasing instead. NOTE: post field_gaps round 2 design call — the .type/.content split applies only to LCA (lca_mc_26 sets .type; lca_mc_27 sets .content). LCC/SLCA only need .type because their cross-method alignment is type-level.

fields.computed_from: alias / cross-method consistency check vs lca.reference_scenario.type (when LCA active) or lcc.reference_scenario.type
fields.derivation: Symmetric to lcc.reference_scenario.type. Equality enforced by IR-07; computed aliasing rather than separate Phase 1 storage.

used_by_rules: B-06 (referenced in human-readable assertion; formal assertion uses source fields)
fields.derivation: amortized = (included == true) AND (amortization_period is not null AND amortization_period > 0). NOT a stored field; computed on demand.

used_by_rules: B-06 (referenced in human-readable assertion; formal assertion uses source fields)
fields.derivation: Symmetric to lca version. Same boolean rule.
